query: Lee Jae-myung approval rating Gallup Korea Realmeter late June early July 2026, is approval still falling, what is driving the decline, any dead cross
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding:

**The "still falling" premise is outdated.** As of mid-July 2026, Lee Jae-myung's approval **bottomed in late June and has rebounded** in both major polls:

- **Gallup Korea**: Hit a floor of **51%** (June 24–26, its lowest since inauguration), then rebounded to **54%** (June 30–July 2). Gallup never registered a formal dead cross.
- **Realmeter**: Registered its **first-ever "dead cross"** (~June 22: 46.7% approve vs 49.7% disapprove) after six straight weekly declines. The dead cross persisted through early July but **ended on the July 13 release** (48.9% approve vs 47.7% disapprove — up for a 2nd straight week).

**Yes, there was a dead cross** — but only in Realmeter, lasting about four weeks (~June 22 to ~July 13).

**Drivers of the decline**: June 3 local election management failures / NEC irregularities controversy (the main catalyst), ruling-party infighting, economic/housing concerns, and "excessive" welfare spending. **Drivers of the recovery**: diplomacy/security wins (NATO summit, Korea-Japan summit) and Gallup's "three mega projects."

sources.title: Lee's approval rating sinks to lowest point since taking office: Gallup poll
sources.snippet: Approval dropped to 51%, lowest since taking office; disapproval 41%; drivers: economy, housing, NEC irregularities. Survey June 24-26, 1,000 respondents, ±3.1pp.

sources.title: President Lee Jae Myung's approval rating recovers slightly to 54%... impact of the 'three mega projects' [Korea Gallup]
sources.snippet: Gallup job approval at 54%, a slight increase; recovery attributed to three mega projects.

sources.title: 이재명 대통령 지지율 54%로 상승전환...민주 41%·국힘 26% [갤럽]
sources.snippet: Gallup June 30-July 2: approval 54% (+3pp), disapproval 36% (-5pp); DPK 41%, PPP 26%.

sources.title: President Lee Jae Myung's disapproval exceeds approval for first time
sources.snippet: Realmeter: 46.7% approve (-4.8pp) vs 49.7% disapprove (+5.5pp); first dead cross; drivers election management failures and DPK infighting.

sources.title: Lee's Approval Hits First 'Dead Cross' Since Inauguration
sources.snippet: Lee's job approval recorded its first dead cross since inauguration.

sources.title: South Korean president's approval falls for sixth week
sources.snippet: Realmeter: approval fell for a 6th consecutive week to 46.5%; disapproval 49.5%. Survey 2,502 adults.

sources.title: 이대통령 지지율 47.0%...7주만에 소폭 반등 [리얼미터]
sources.snippet: Realmeter July 6 release: approval 47.0% (+0.5pp), disapproval 49.2%; gap narrowed to 2.2pp; stock plunge and high FX cited as negatives; DPK 43.0%, PPP 40.3%.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating rises for 2nd consecutive week: poll
sources.snippet: Realmeter: approval climbed to 48.9% (+1.9pp), disapproval 47.7% (-1.5pp); driven by diplomacy sentiment; 2nd straight week of gains.

sources.title: 이대통령 지지율 2주 연속 올라 48.9%...민주 44-국힘 38 [리얼미터]
sources.snippet: Realmeter July 6-10 (released July 13): approval 48.9%, disapproval 47.7%; recovery attributed to NATO summit attendance and Korea-Japan summit; DPK 44%, PPP 38%.

sources.title: Presidential job approval sees first 'dead cross' reversal... conflicts between presidency and party
sources.snippet: First dead cross linked to lack of policies to soothe public sentiment amid presidency-party and intra-party conflicts.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating dips to 64 pct over 'excessive' welfare, spending concerns
sources.snippet: Gallup early May: approval 64% (-3pp); 'excessive' welfare policies cited as key factor.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating hits new high of 65.5%: Realmeter
Lee's approval falls to 51.5% as PPP overtakes Democratic Party: Poll
sources.snippet: After June 3 local elections, approval fell for 4th straight week to 51.5%; PPP reached 44.3%, overtaking DPK.
